payload.summary_en: Qonhub AI 2.1.0 adds the Enterprise Knowledge drafting workflow, improves source coverage during AI cleanup and structured organization, and includes live theme editing, target-site SEO, distribution visibility, the APIHot recommendation theme, and deployment stability improvements.
payload.upgrade_tip_en: After upgrading, run php artisan migrate, php artisan optimize, and restart queue workers. Enterprise Knowledge drafting depends on background queues and available AI models, so verify workers before processing long source files.
